ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the file */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the file (e.g., news website, social media) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the original source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels associated with the file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is publicly accessible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being analyzed */,
  "baseline" REAL /* Baseline value for the file */,
  "baseline_date" TEXT /* Date of the baseline value */,
  "peak" REAL /* Peak value for the file */,
  "peak_date" TEXT /* Date of the peak value */,
  "percent_increase" REAL /* Percent increase from baseline to peak */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the file */,
  "sentiment_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Trend score of the file */,
  "trend_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when trend analysis was performed */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the file */,
  "engagement_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when engagement analysis was performed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the file was originally published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file associated with the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword text */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the keyword to the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the keyword was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file associated with the topic */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic text */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the topic to the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file mentioning the individual */,
  "individual" TEXT /* Individual's name */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the individual to the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., news website, social media) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-permission relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
